title: Create Vanilla Mechanics
description: A lightweight vanilla-style modpack built around the Create Mod, focused on simple automation, quality-of-life improvements, and high performance.
body:
⚙️ **Modpack Description**

A lightweight vanilla-like modpack built around the amazing Create Mod.

This modpack expands Minecraft with mechanical engineering, automation, and factories while keeping the core vanilla survival experience intact.

Design farms, production lines, and complex machines using gears, wind power, and mechanical systems without turning the game into a heavy tech modpack.

The goal is to provide a smooth, optimized, and immersive Create experience that still feels like Minecraft.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rR8W-f9YhYA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

</details>



💻 **Technology**

At the heart of the pack is the Create Mod, allowing players to build:

  -mechanical machines

  -automated farms

  -conveyor systems

  -railway networks

  -complex factories

Additional Create addons enhance trains, decorations, and building possibilities.

✅ **Vanilla+ Gameplay**

The pack keeps gameplay close to vanilla while adding small improvements:

  -Better farming and cooking

  -Decorative building blocks

  -Backpacks for better storage

  -Quality-of-life improvements

Everything is designed to feel like a natural extension of Minecraft, not a completely different game.

💥 **Utilities**

Helpful tools are included to make gameplay smoother:

  -Map and navigation tools

  -Recipe viewer for crafting

  -Configuration improvements
🔋 **Performance Optimized**

This modpack includes several performance mods to ensure high FPS and smooth gameplay, even with automation and large builds.

Rendering, memory usage, and entity processing are all optimized to keep the game running efficiently.

🌄 **Graphics**

Optional shader support and visual improvements are included for players who want a more immersive experience without sacrificing performance.
